labels: But... but I... I didn't know how to face her, and I was afraid she'd find out the truth—that I'm a total failure... So I just kept lying... about everything...
Imprinted with the battle consciousness of Tina, can be used to create Battle Imagine - Tina.
Battle Imagine is the crystallization of thoughts, consciousness, and Engram combined, possessing supernatural powers.

textFields.text: But... but I... I didn't know how to face her, and I was afraid she'd find out the truth—that I'm a total failure... So I just kept lying... about everything...

labels: Even if I were willing to cooperate, I must warn you that the Legion's security is tighter than ever right now...
But what exactly was in that soup? I wonder whether those two guys decided to keep drinking it.
